subject: docs(consolidate): merge update guide and status tracker into PROJECT_DOCS.md
body:
Two separate docs (DOCS_UPDATE_GUIDE.md and PROJECT_DOCS_STATUS.md)
covered the same process with overlapping scrubbing rules, private
repo lists, and update checklists. Merged into a single PROJECT_DOCS.md
that has the status table at the top and the full update process below.

Also filled gaps found by walking through each scenario:
- Added meta.json template with field explanations for new projects
- Added HTML card templates for both user-facing and internal tools
- Added "Extracting Tutorial Content" section with search command
  and guidance for finding TutorialModal across different frameworks
- Added trailing slash requirement to URL update section

Tags: docs, consolidation, maintenance
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: portfolio-site
Semver: patch
